pull_request.title: 🧹 [Code Health] Refactor generate_manifold
pull_request.description: Refactored the `generate_manifold` function in `cflibs/manifold/generator.py` to extract complex inline logic into private helper methods (`_build_parameter_grid`, `_init_storage`, `_save_metadata`, `_compute_and_save_batches`).

changes.description: Extracted generation, storage, metadata, and computation batching logic into separate private helper functions to improve readability and maintainability.
